sentences.text: Thank you for calling real property calls may be conducted on a recorded line. If you know your party's three digit extension, please dial it now. To report an emergency maintenance concern, press one. If you are an owner calling about your neighborhood or condominium Association, press two. If you currently rent from us or you are inquiring about apartment availabilities, press three. For directions to our office, press four. For a directory of our office staff Press five. To be connected to our receptionist,

please enter at least the first three letters of the person's first name for Q. Press seven For Z. Press nine. For the main menu, press zero Lindsay Eastern extension three hundred and one To select this extension, press one. To repeat the current name, press three more. To start your search. Please hold while I try to connect you. Mhm. Mhm mm mm. Mhm. And your call has been forwarded to the voicemail for Lindsay Eastern. No one is available to take your call at the tone record your message when you finished recording, you may hang up or press the pound key. For more options

Hey, Lindsay this is calling from rentable. I just wanted to follow up on a couple of emails. I sent you last week regarding our rest of 20, free promotion. Um, we get any vacancies you may have in front of high intent renters on social and our top. I just wanted to discuss that with you. I'll send you an
email follow up as well. If you can reply to that. I'd appreciate it either way. Thanks.

conversation.title: Call: Fred Amenita and Lindsey Easton @ Real Property, Inc.
